description: Approved API breaking changes that should be ignored by the contract checker

entries.reason: Nullable shipper/ssl fields now use allOf+$ref with nullable:true (OAS 3.0 canonical form) instead of inline objects. Kafka connection_type/username/password became optional to match runtime behavior. Coordinated with provider team.

PUT request body uses UpdateOutputSchema with meta IDs, changing inline anyOf members to $ref components. Data shape is identical; adds otel_exporter_config_yaml field.
Optional package policy stream data_stream.type in 200 responses for OTel inputs with dynamic_signal_types (composable integrations).
